prostĆedĂ­&quot;">â</a></h2><p>Projekt je navrĆŸen pro plnohodnotnĂœ vĂœvoj bez nutnosti Android Studia.</p><p>PouĆŸĂ­vanĂ© nĂĄstroje:</p><ul><li>Android telefon (Termux + Ubuntu chroot)</li><li>Git &amp; GitHub</li><li>Node.js &amp; npm (Frontend toolchain)</li><li>Vite (Bundler)</li><li>Capacitor (Native bridge)</li><li>Gradle &amp; Java JDK 21 (Android kompilace)</li></ul><h2 id="doporucena-struktura-toku" tabindex="-1">DoporuÄenĂĄ struktura toku <a class="header-anchor" href="#doporucena-struktura-toku" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;DoporuÄenĂĄ struktura toku&quot;">â</a></h2><p>VĂœvoj (React / Vite) â Build (dist/) â Capacitor Sync (android/) â APK SestavenĂ­ â NasazenĂ­</p><p>VĂœvoj probĂ­hĂĄ primĂĄrnÄ v koĆenovĂ©m adresĂĄĆi (sloĆŸka <code>src/</code>). NativnĂ­ Android sloĆŸka (<code>android/</code>) se upravuje pouze pĆi pĆidĂĄvĂĄnĂ­ specifickĂœch oprĂĄvnÄnĂ­ (Manifest) nebo nativnĂ­ch pluginĆŻ.</p></div></div></main><footer class="VPDocFooter" data-v-39a288b8 data-v-e257564d><!--[--><!--]--><!----><nav class="prev-next" aria-labelledby="doc-footer-aria-label" data-v-e257564d><span class="visually-hidden" id="doc-footer-aria-label" data-v-e257564d>Pager</span><div class="pager" data-v-e257564d><!----></div><div class="pager" data-v-e257564d><a class="VPLink link pager-link next" href="/docs/architecture/01-system-overview.html" data-v-e257564d><!--[--><span class="desc" data-v-e257564d>Next page</span><span class="title" data-v-e257564d>PĆehled</span><!--]--></a></div></nav></footer><!--[--><!--]--></div></div></div><!--[--><!--]--></div></div><!----><!--[--><!--]--></div></div>

sklĂĄdĂĄ ze dvou oddÄlenĂœch fĂĄzĂ­.</p><h2 id="_1-webovy-build-frontend" tabindex="-1">1. WebovĂœ Build (Frontend) <a class="header-anchor" href="#_1-webovy-build-frontend" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;1. WebovĂœ Build (Frontend)&quot;">â</a></h2><p>NeĆŸ je moĆŸnĂ© vytvoĆit Android aplikaci, musĂ­ se zkompilovat React kĂłd: <code>npm run build</code> (Tento krok vytvoĆĂ­ optimalizovanĂ© HTML/JS/CSS soubory ve sloĆŸce <code>dist/</code>).</p><h2 id="_2-capacitor-synchronizace" tabindex="-1">2. Capacitor Synchronizace <a class="header-anchor" href="#_2-capacitor-synchronizace" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;2. Capacitor Synchronizace&quot;">â</a></h2><p>PĆekopĂ­rovĂĄnĂ­ zkompilovanĂ©ho webu do Android struktury: <code>npx cap sync android</code></p><h2 id="_3-nativni-build-android" tabindex="-1">3. NativnĂ­ Build (Android) <a class="header-anchor" href="#_3-nativni-build-android" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;3. NativnĂ­ Build (Android)&quot;">â</a></h2><p><strong>Debug Build:</strong> SlouĆŸĂ­ pro lokĂĄlnĂ­ vĂœvoj a testovĂĄnĂ­ (nevyĆŸaduje finĂĄlnĂ­ produkÄnĂ­ certifikĂĄt). <code>cd android &amp;&amp; ./gradlew assembleDebug</code></p><p><strong>Release Build:</strong> PouĆŸĂ­vĂĄ se pro produkÄnĂ­ nasazenĂ­. MusĂ­ bĂœt podepsĂĄn (Keystore) a optimalizovĂĄn (ProGuard). <code>cd android &amp;&amp; ./gradlew assembleRelease</code></p><h2 id="kontrola" tabindex="-1">Kontrola <a class="header-anchor" href="#kontrola" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;Kontrola&quot;">â</a></h2><p>Po kaĆŸdĂ©m buildu ovÄĆit:</p><ul><li>Aplikace se spustĂ­ (White-screen test).</li><li>PĆipojenĂ­ k AWS backendu funguje (nenĂ­ zablokovĂĄno CORS nebo HTTP cleartext restrikcemi).</li><li>Logcat neobsahuje fatĂĄlnĂ­ chyby JS runtime.</li></ul></div></div></main><footer class="VPDocFooter" data-v-39a288b8 data-v-e257564d><!--[--><!--]--><!----><nav class="prev-next" aria-labelledby="doc-footer-aria-label" data-v-e257564d><span class="visually-hidden" id="doc-footer-aria-label" data-v-e257564d>Pager</span><div class="pager" data-v-e257564d><!----></div><div class="pager" data-v-e257564d><a class="VPLink link pager-link next" href="/docs/architecture/01-system-overview.html" data-v-e257564d><!--[--><span class="desc" data-v-e257564d>Next page</span><span class="title" data-v-e257564d>PĆehled</span><!--]--></a></div></nav></footer><!--[--><!--]--></div></div></div><!--[--><!--]--></div></div><!----><!--[--><!--]--></div></div>

data-v-39a288b8><!--[--><!--]--><main class="main" data-v-39a288b8><div style="position:relative;" class="vp-doc _docs_development_06-github-actions" data-v-39a288b8><div><h1 id="github-actions-ci-cd" tabindex="-1">GitHub Actions CI/CD <a class="header-anchor" href="#github-actions-ci-cd" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;GitHub Actions CI/CD&quot;">â</a></h1><h2 id="prehled" tabindex="-1">PĆehled <a class="header-anchor" href="#prehled" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;PĆehled&quot;">â</a></h2><p>GitHub Actions slouĆŸĂ­ jako automatizovanĂĄ vĂœvojovĂĄ pipeline. ZajiĆĄĆ„uje ÄistĂœ a nezĂĄvislĂœ build mimo lokĂĄlnĂ­ Termux prostĆedĂ­.</p><h2 id="architektura-ci" tabindex="-1">Architektura CI <a class="header-anchor" href="#architektura-ci" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;Architektura CI&quot;">â</a></h2><p>Developer -&gt; git push -&gt; GitHub -&gt; Ubuntu Runner -&gt; NPM Build -&gt; Capacitor Sync -&gt; Gradle Build -&gt; APK Artifact</p><h2 id="aktualni-technologie" tabindex="-1">AktuĂĄlnĂ­ technologie <a class="header-anchor" href="#aktualni-technologie" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;AktuĂĄlnĂ­ technologie&quot;">â</a></h2><ul><li>GitHub Actions (Ubuntu Runner)</li><li>Node.js (pro Vite)</li><li>JDK 21 &amp; Gradle 8.x</li><li>Android SDK &amp; Capacitor</li></ul><h2 id="doporucene-kroky-pipeline" tabindex="-1">DoporuÄenĂ© kroky pipeline <a class="header-anchor" href="#doporucene-kroky-pipeline" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;DoporuÄenĂ© kroky pipeline&quot;">â</a></h2><p><strong>1. Checkout:</strong> StaĆŸenĂ­ zdrojovĂ©ho kĂłdu (<code>actions/checkout</code>). <strong>2. Setup Node &amp; Java:</strong> PĆĂ­prava prostĆedĂ­ pro kompilaci. <strong>3. Instalace zĂĄvislostĂ­:</strong> <code>npm install</code>. <strong>4. Frontend Build (KritickĂœ krok):</strong> <code>npm run build</code>. <strong>5. Capacitor Sync:</strong> <code>npx cap sync android</code>. <strong>6. Android Build:</strong> <code>cd android &amp;&amp; ./gradlew assembleDebug</code>.</p><h2 id="historicke-milniky-ci" tabindex="-1">HistorickĂ© milnĂ­ky CI <a class="header-anchor" href="#historicke-milniky-ci" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;HistorickĂ© milnĂ­ky CI&quot;">â</a></h2><ul><li><strong>Gradle &amp; JDK 21 upgrade:</strong> PĆĂ­prava na modernĂ­ standardy.</li><li><strong>OdstranÄnĂ­ Cordova zĂĄvislostĂ­:</strong> PĆidĂĄn auditovatelnĂœ skript (bĂœvalĂœ commit e668899) pro odstranÄnĂ­ nepotĆebnĂœch pluginĆŻ, ÄĂ­mĆŸ se odlehÄil build.</li></ul><h2 id="budouci-rozsireni" tabindex="-1">BudoucĂ­ rozĆĄĂ­ĆenĂ­ <a class="header-anchor" href="#budouci-rozsireni" aria-label="Permalink to &quot;BudoucĂ­ rozĆĄĂ­ĆenĂ­&quot;">â</a></h2><ul><li>AutomatickĂ© nahrĂĄvĂĄnĂ­ APK jako Artifactu pro okamĆŸitĂ© staĆŸenĂ­ z GitHubu.</li><li>AutomatickĂœ deployment Node.js backendu na AWS pĆi zmÄnÄ ve vÄtvi main.</li></ul></div></div></main><footer class="VPDocFooter" data-v-39a288b8 data-v-e257564d><!--[--><!--]--><!----><nav class="prev-next" aria-labelledby="doc-footer-aria-label" data-v-e257564d><span class="visually-hidden" id="doc-footer-aria-label" data-v-e257564d>Pager</span><div class="pager" data-v-e257564d><!----></div><div class="pager" data-v-e257564d><a class="VPLink link pager-link next" href="/docs/architecture/01-system-overview.html" data-v-e257564d><!--[--><span class="desc" data-v-e257564d>Next page</span><span class="title" data-v-e257564d>PĆehled</span><!--]--></a></div></nav></footer><!--[--><!--]--></div></div></div><!--[--><!--]--></div></div><!----><!--[--><!--]--></div></div>

# Frontend Client Overview (React + Capacitor)

## ĂÄel
Tato ÄĂĄst systĂ©mu pĆedstavuje klientskou aplikaci RBank. 

Je implementovĂĄna jako **hybridnĂ­ aplikace** pomocĂ­ React.js a zabalena do nativnĂ­ slupky pomocĂ­ technologie Capacitor. 
JejĂ­m Ășkolem je poskytovat modernĂ­ uĆŸivatelskĂ© rozhranĂ­ (UI) a komunikovat s backendem na AWS prostĆednictvĂ­m REST API.

Aplikace je tzv. "thin client" (tenkĂœ klient) â neobsahuje ĆŸĂĄdnou sloĆŸitou obchodnĂ­ logiku, veĆĄkerĂĄ data a vĂœpoÄty pochĂĄzejĂ­ z backendu.

## HlavnĂ­ odpovÄdnosti
- Prezentace dat (Dashboard, Historie, Karty)
- Navigace a routovĂĄnĂ­ (React Router)
- Komunikace s REST API (Fetch API)
- BezpeÄnĂ© uklĂĄdĂĄnĂ­ tokenĆŻ (Capacitor Preferences)
- PĆĂ­stup k nativnĂ­m funkcĂ­m (SchrĂĄnka, Toast notifikace, HW tlaÄĂ­tko ZpÄt)

## Architektura
React / Vite Frontend 
â
Capacitor Bridge (NativnĂ­ vrstva)
â
HTTP / REST API
â
Node.js Backend (AWS)
â
DatabĂĄze

# User Interface (Tailwind CSS)

UI vychĂĄzĂ­ z modernĂ­ch mobilnĂ­ch bankovnĂ­ch aplikacĂ­ s dĆŻrazem na ÄistĂœ a elegantnĂ­ **Dark Mode** design (navy blue / dark ĆĄedĂĄ).

## Principy a Technologie
- **Tailwind CSS:** PouĆŸĂ­vĂĄ se pro veĆĄkerĂ© stylovĂĄnĂ­ aplikacĂ­ pĆĂ­mo v className atributech (utility-first pĆĂ­stup).

- **Responzivita:** AÄkoliv je aplikace primĂĄrnÄ mobilnĂ­, UI prvky musĂ­ sprĂĄvnÄ vyuĆŸĂ­vat Flexbox (`flex`, `justify-between`) pro korektnĂ­ zobrazenĂ­ na rĆŻznĂœch velikostech displejĆŻ.

# Navigation (React Router)

Navigace v aplikaci je ÄistÄ webovĂĄ (Single Page Application) a ĆĂ­dĂ­ ji knihovna **React Router DOM**.

## Architektura navigace
- `<BrowserRouter>` v souboru `App.jsx` definuje cesty (Routes) k jednotlivĂœm strĂĄnkĂĄm (`/`, `/history`, `/payment`).
- `<BottomNav>` komponenta slouĆŸĂ­ jako hlavnĂ­ ovlĂĄdacĂ­ prvek pro pĆepĂ­nĂĄnĂ­ zĂĄkladnĂ­ch sekcĂ­ na spodnĂ­ hranÄ displeje.
- Funkce `useNavigate()` slouĆŸĂ­ k programatickĂ©mu pĆechodu mezi obrazovkami.

## NativnĂ­ integrace
SouÄĂĄstĂ­ navigace je vlastnĂ­ komponenta `<BackButtonHandler>`, kterĂĄ komunikuje pĆes Capacitor API (`@capacitor/app`). ZajiĆĄĆ„uje, ĆŸe hardwarovĂ© tlaÄĂ­tko "ZpÄt" na Android zaĆĂ­zenĂ­ch vracĂ­ uĆŸivatele v historii React Routeru, nebo bezpeÄnÄ ukonÄĂ­ aplikaci dvojitĂœm stisknutĂ­m na hlavnĂ­ obrazovce.

# Components & Pages

Ve starĆĄĂ­ verzi dokumentace se poÄĂ­talo s Android Fragmenty. NynĂ­ je veĆĄkerĂ© UI tvoĆeno **React Komponentami**.

## RozdÄlenĂ­
1. **Pages (StrĂĄnky):**
   - ReprezentujĂ­ celou obrazovku, na kterou vede konkrĂ©tnĂ­ URL (napĆ. `Dashboard.jsx`).
   - ObsahujĂ­ stav (`useState`) a starajĂ­ se o naÄĂ­tĂĄnĂ­ dat z backendu (`useEffect`).
2. **Components (Komponenty):**
   - ZnovupouĆŸitelnĂ© stavebnĂ­ bloky (napĆ. `BottomNav.jsx`, tlaÄĂ­tka, avatary).

# Networking

Aplikace komunikuje s backendem pĆes HTTP REST API pomocĂ­ standardnĂ­ webovĂ© funkce `fetch()`.

## AktuĂĄlnĂ­ stav
- Backend je nasazen v produkÄnĂ­m cloudovĂ©m prostĆedĂ­ na AWS.
- URL endpointĆŻ: `http://13.49.77.58:3000/api/...`
- VeĆĄkerĂ© poĆŸadavky vracejĂ­ a pĆijĂ­majĂ­ data ve formĂĄtu **JSON**.

## Architektura a BezpeÄnost

- Pro rozsĂĄhlĂ© seznamy (napĆ. historie transakcĂ­) je implementovĂĄno bezpeÄnĂ© strĂĄnkovĂĄnĂ­ (parametry `?page=` a `?limit=`).

# REST API Overview

Backend RBank vystavuje standardnĂ­ RESTful API pro komunikaci s frontendovĂœmi klienty.

## ZĂĄkladnĂ­ informace
- **Host:** CloudovĂœ server na AWS
- **IP/DomĂ©na:** `http://13.49.77.58:3000` (pro produkci se plĂĄnuje HTTPS/domĂ©na)
- **FormĂĄt dat:** VeĆĄkerĂœ datovĂœ pĆenos (Request i Response) probĂ­hĂĄ ve formĂĄtu `application/json`.

## ZabezpeÄenĂ­ a CORS
- API musĂ­ povolovat poĆŸadavky z Capacitor klienta (`capacitor://localhost` nebo `http://localhost`).
- VĆĄechny endpointy pracujĂ­cĂ­ s klientskĂœmi daty vyĆŸadujĂ­ platnou autentizaci.

# Authentication

API vyuĆŸĂ­vĂĄ pro ovÄĆovĂĄnĂ­ uĆŸivatelĆŻ JSON Web Tokens (JWT).

## Princip
1. Klient odeĆĄle pĆihlaĆĄovacĂ­ Ășdaje (login/heslo).
2. Backend (AWS Node.js) je ovÄĆĂ­ vĆŻÄi databĂĄzi a vrĂĄtĂ­ podepsanĂœ JWT token.
3. Klient (Capacitor) si token bezpeÄnÄ uloĆŸĂ­ (ideĂĄlnÄ pĆes Capacitor Preferences/Secure Storage).
4. KaĆŸdĂœ dalĆĄĂ­ poĆŸadavek na chrĂĄnÄnĂœ endpoint musĂ­ obsahovat hlaviÄku:
   `Authorization: Bearer <tvuj_token>`

# API Endpoints

## ZĆŻstatek ĂșÄtu
- **URL:** `/api/balance`
- **Method:** `GET`
- **Response:** `{ "balance": 125000.00 }`

## Historie transakcĂ­
- **URL:** `/api/transactions`
- **Method:** `GET`
- **Query Parametry:** `?page=1&limit=15`
- **Response (Array):** VracĂ­ pole transakcĂ­ (id, name, amount, type, created_at).

# API Errors (OĆĄetĆenĂ­ chyb)

API vyuĆŸĂ­vĂĄ standardnĂ­ HTTP stavovĂ© kĂłdy k indikaci ĂșspÄchu nebo selhĂĄnĂ­ poĆŸadavku.

## StandardnĂ­ HTTP KĂłdy
- **200 OK:** PoĆŸadavek byl ĂșspÄĆĄnÄ zpracovĂĄn.
- **400 Bad Request:** ChybnĂ© parametry (napĆ. chybÄjĂ­cĂ­ povinnĂĄ pole v POST requestu).
- **401 Unauthorized:** ChybĂ­ nebo je neplatnĂœ autentizaÄnĂ­ token.
- **403 Forbidden:** Token je platnĂœ, ale uĆŸivatel nemĂĄ prĂĄvo na danou akci.
- **404 Not Found:** Endpoint nebo poĆŸadovanĂœ zdroj neexistuje.
- **500 Internal Server Error:** NeoÄekĂĄvanĂĄ chyba na stranÄ AWS serveru.

## FormĂĄt chybovĂ© odpovÄdi
V pĆĂ­padÄ chyby backend (Node.js) vĆŸdy vracĂ­ JSON ve sjednocenĂ©m formĂĄtu, aby na nÄj frontend mohl snadno reagovat:
```json
{
  "error": true,
  "code": 401,
  "message": "NeplatnĂœ autentizaÄnĂ­ token."
}

# System Overview

RBank je modernĂ­ full-stack bankovnĂ­ aplikace rozdÄlenĂĄ na nezĂĄvislĂœ frontend a cloudovĂœ backend.

## ArchitektonickĂœ vzor
SystĂ©m vyuĆŸĂ­vĂĄ architekturu **Client-Server** s oddÄlenĂœm prezentaÄnĂ­m a datovĂœm vrstvenĂ­m (Decoupled Architecture).

1. **Frontend (TenkĂœ klient):** 
   - NapsanĂœ v React.js, stylovanĂœ pĆes Tailwind CSS.
   - BÄĆŸĂ­ jako hybridnĂ­ mobilnĂ­ aplikace pomocĂ­ Capacitoru.
   - NeudrĆŸuje ĆŸĂĄdnou perzistentnĂ­ obchodnĂ­ logiku, slouĆŸĂ­ vĂœhradnÄ k prezentaci dat.
2. **Backend (API Gateway & Business Logic):**
   - Node.js server bÄĆŸĂ­cĂ­ na AWS infrastruktuĆe.
   - ZajiĆĄĆ„uje autentizaci, validaci a komunikaci s databĂĄzĂ­.
3. **DatabĂĄze:**
   - RelaÄnĂ­ ĂșloĆŸiĆĄtÄ pro transakce a uĆŸivatelskĂĄ data.

## DatovĂœ tok
UĆŸivatel (Mobil) -> Capacitor WebView -> HTTPS/REST -> AWS Node.js Server -> DatabĂĄze

========================================
 FILE: docs/architecture/02-data-flow.md

# Data Flow

Tento dokument popisuje ĆŸivotnĂ­ cyklus dat od uĆŸivatelskĂ©ho kliknutĂ­ v UI aĆŸ po zĂĄpis do databĂĄze.

## Cesta poĆŸadavku (PĆĂ­klad: NaÄtenĂ­ historie)
1. **Frontend (React):** UĆŸivatel otevĂ­rĂĄ obrazovku Historie nebo scrolluje dolĆŻ.
2. **React Hook:** SpustĂ­ se `useEffect` nebo udĂĄlost `onScroll`.
3. **Network Layer:** ProhlĂ­ĆŸeÄ (WebView v Capacitoru) zformuluje HTTP GET poĆŸadavek.
4. **Internet:** PoĆŸadavek opouĆĄtĂ­ telefon a putuje na IP `13.49.77.58` (AWS).
5. **Backend (Node.js):** Router zachytĂ­ endpoint `/api/transactions`, Controller pĆeÄte query parametry `page` a `limit`.
6. **DatabĂĄze:** Service vrstva sestavĂ­ SQL dotaz a dotĂĄĆŸe se databĂĄze (pĆes Repository).
7. **NĂĄvrat (Response):** DatabĂĄze vracĂ­ surovĂĄ data, Node.js je zabalĂ­ do JSON a odeĆĄle zpÄt klientovi.
8. **Render:** React pĆijme JSON, upravĂ­ state (`setTransactions`) a Tailwind pĆekreslĂ­ UI (vygeneruje ikony, barvy, ÄĂĄstky).

# System Components

SystĂ©m je sloĆŸen ze tĆĂ­ hlavnĂ­ch technologickĂœch pilĂ­ĆĆŻ.

## 1. Frontend (RBank App)
- **Framework:** React.js s Vite
- **UI & StylovĂĄnĂ­:** Tailwind CSS (Navy Blue design systĂ©m)
- **NativnĂ­ bÄhovĂ© prostĆedĂ­:** Capacitor (obaluje web do Android APK)
- **RoutovĂĄnĂ­:** React Router DOM

## 2. Backend (API Gateway)
- **ProstĆedĂ­:** Node.js (hostovĂĄno na AWS EC2 / VM)
- **Architektura:** RESTful API
- **Ăloha:** Validace dat, autentizace, abstrakce databĂĄze, ochrana pĆed pĆĂ­mĂœm pĆĂ­stupem.

## 3. Storage (DatabĂĄze)
- RelaÄnĂ­ databĂĄze (PlĂĄnovĂĄno PostgreSQL nebo MySQL)
- DrĆŸĂ­ "Single Source of Truth" (jedinou verzi pravdy).

# Architecture Decisions (ADR)

ZĂĄznam klĂ­ÄovĂœch architektonickĂœch rozhodnutĂ­, kterĂĄ formovala vĂœvoj projektu RBank.

## ADR-001: PĆechod z Native Java na React + Capacitor
**Kontext:** PĆŻvodnĂ­ prototyp aplikace se psal v JavÄ pomocĂ­ FragmentĆŻ a RecyclerView.
**RozhodnutĂ­:** Projekt byl kompletnÄ pĆepsĂĄn do Reactu a zabalen pĆes Capacitor.
**DĆŻvod:** ZrychlenĂ­ vĂœvoje (Hot-Reload pĆes Vite), moĆŸnost sdĂ­let kĂłd pro pĆĂ­padnĂœ webovĂœ portĂĄl (PWA) a iOS verzi, vyuĆŸitĂ­ Tailwind CSS pro modernĂ­ UI design. OpuĆĄtÄnĂ­ sloĆŸitĂ© sprĂĄvy pamÄti (Adaptery/ViewHoldery).

## ADR-002: Backend-driven UI data
**Kontext:** Klient potĆebuje zobrazovat ikony, barvy (pĆĂ­jem/vĂœdaj) a avatary u transakcĂ­.
**RozhodnutĂ­:** DatabĂĄze a API odesĂ­lajĂ­ pouze surovĂĄ finanÄnĂ­ data (nĂĄzev, ÄĂĄstka). Frontend si vizuĂĄlnĂ­ vlastnosti dopoÄĂ­tĂĄvĂĄ sĂĄm v prezentaÄnĂ­ vrstvÄ.
**DĆŻvod:** SnĂ­ĆŸenĂ­ zĂĄtÄĆŸe databĂĄze, menĆĄĂ­ payload pĆenĂĄĆĄenĂœ po sĂ­ti a ÄistĂ© oddÄlenĂ­ dat od UI (Single Responsibility).

# Backend Overview

## ĂÄel
Backend je centrĂĄlnĂ­ vrstva systĂ©mu RBank, aktuĂĄlnÄ hostovanĂĄ na cloudovĂ© infrastruktuĆe AWS (Node.js).

ZajiĆĄĆ„uje veĆĄkerou komunikaci mezi klientskou aplikacĂ­ (React/Capacitor) a databĂĄzĂ­. KlientskĂĄ aplikace nikdy nepĆistupuje pĆĂ­mo do databĂĄze.

## OdpovÄdnosti backendu
- PoskytovĂĄnĂ­ REST API
- ZpracovĂĄnĂ­ CORS pro webovĂ© klienty
- Validace vstupĆŻ
- Business logika
- PĆĂ­stup k databĂĄzi
- Autentizace a autorizace
- LogovĂĄnĂ­

## Princip
Frontend (React) -> HTTP/REST -> Node.js Backend (AWS) -> DatabĂĄze

Backend pĆedstavuje jedinĂœ vstupnĂ­ bod pro prĂĄci s daty.

## DlouhodobĂœ cĂ­l
Backend musĂ­ bĂœt schopen obslouĆŸit:
- HybridnĂ­ mobilnĂ­ aplikaci (Capacitor)
- StandardnĂ­ webovĂœ prohlĂ­ĆŸeÄ
- ExternĂ­ API klienty

# Backend Architecture

Backend je postaven na platformÄ Node.js a je rozdÄlen do standardnĂ­ch logickĂœch vrstev, coĆŸ usnadĆuje testovĂĄnĂ­ a ĂșdrĆŸbu.

## DatovĂœ tok
Request -> Router -> Controller -> Service -> Repository -> Database

## OdpovÄdnosti vrstev
- **Router:** PĆijĂ­mĂĄ HTTP poĆŸadavky a definuje endpointy.
- **Controller:** Zpracuje HTTP poĆŸadavek (vstupnĂ­ parametry) a vracĂ­ JSON odpovÄÄ.
- **Service:** Obsahuje Äistou obchodnĂ­ logiku (nezĂĄvislou na HTTP).
- **Repository:** JedinĂĄ vrstva, kterĂĄ komunikuje pĆĂ­mo s databĂĄzĂ­ (SQL dotazy/ORM).
- **Database:** FyzickĂ© ĂșloĆŸiĆĄtÄ dat.

DodrĆŸuje se striktnÄ princip Single Responsibility (jednotnĂ© odpovÄdnosti).

# Backend Security

BezpeÄnost backendu je jednou z hlavnĂ­ch priorit.

## ZĂĄkladnĂ­ pravidla:
- StriktnĂ­ validace vĆĄech HTTP vstupĆŻ (Query parametry, Body)
- Sanitizace dat pĆed odeslĂĄnĂ­m do databĂĄze (prevence SQL Injection)
- UzavĆenĂœ pĆĂ­mĂœ pĆĂ­stup k databĂĄzi (pouze localhost nebo whitelisted IP)
- Ochrana citlivĂœch ĂșdajĆŻ v logovacĂ­ch systĂ©mech

## BezpeÄnostnĂ­ roadmapa:
- NasazenĂ­ HTTPS certifikĂĄtu pĆes Nginx (ReverznĂ­ proxy na AWS)
- Autentizace pomocĂ­ JWT (JSON Web Tokens) a Refresh tokenĆŻ
- LogovĂĄnĂ­ auditnĂ­ stopy
- Rate limiting (prevence zahlcenĂ­ API)
- Ochrana proti brute force ĂștokĆŻm na endpointy

# Database Schema

ZĂĄkladnĂ­ relaÄnĂ­ schĂ©ma pro RBank.

## HlavnĂ­ entity
1. **Users:** `id`, `email`, `password_hash`, `created_at`
2. **Accounts:** `id`, `user_id`, `account_number`, `balance`, `currency`
3. **Transactions:** `id`, `account_id`, `amount`, `type`, `name`, `created_at`

*PoznĂĄmka: AktuĂĄlnÄ probĂ­hĂĄ stabilizace backendu na AWS, detailnĂ­ ERD (Entity Relationship Diagram) bude doplnÄn.*

# Disaster Recovery

Postup obnovy databĂĄze v pĆĂ­padÄ fatĂĄlnĂ­ho selhĂĄnĂ­:

4. PĆesmÄrovat Node.js API (Ășprava `.env`) na novou instanci.
5. Obnovit provoz API.

## DoporuÄenĂœ postup

## VĂœsledek

# Build Guide

Vzhledem k hybridnĂ­ povaze projektu (Capacitor) se build sklĂĄdĂĄ ze dvou oddÄlenĂœch fĂĄzĂ­.

## 1. WebovĂœ Build (Frontend)
NeĆŸ je moĆŸnĂ© vytvoĆit Android aplikaci, musĂ­ se zkompilovat React kĂłd:
`npm run build`
(Tento krok vytvoĆĂ­ optimalizovanĂ© HTML/JS/CSS soubory ve sloĆŸce `dist/`).

## 2. Capacitor Synchronizace
PĆekopĂ­rovĂĄnĂ­ zkompilovanĂ©ho webu do Android struktury:
`npx cap sync android`

## 3. NativnĂ­ Build (Android)
**Debug Build:**
SlouĆŸĂ­ pro lokĂĄlnĂ­ vĂœvoj a testovĂĄnĂ­ (nevyĆŸaduje finĂĄlnĂ­ produkÄnĂ­ certifikĂĄt).
`cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug`

**Release Build:**
PouĆŸĂ­vĂĄ se pro produkÄnĂ­ nasazenĂ­. MusĂ­ bĂœt podepsĂĄn (Keystore) a optimalizovĂĄn (ProGuard).
`cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease`

## Kontrola
Po kaĆŸdĂ©m buildu ovÄĆit:
- Aplikace se spustĂ­ (White-screen test).
- PĆipojenĂ­ k AWS backendu funguje (nenĂ­ zablokovĂĄno CORS nebo HTTP cleartext restrikcemi).
- Logcat neobsahuje fatĂĄlnĂ­ chyby JS runtime.

# Debugging

NejÄastÄjĆĄĂ­ problĂ©my bÄhem hybridnĂ­ho vĂœvoje:

- **BĂ­lĂĄ obrazovka po startu:** Vite build neprobÄhl sprĂĄvnÄ, nebo Capacitor nenachĂĄzĂ­ sloĆŸku `dist`.
- **Chyba sĂ­tÄ (Network Error):** Frontend se snaĆŸĂ­ pĆipojit na `localhost` mĂ­sto na AWS server (`13.49.77.58`), nebo naopak.
- **CORS chyby:** AWS backend odmĂ­tĂĄ poĆŸadavky z Capacitor WebView (vyĆŸaduje Ășpravu hlaviÄek na backendu).
- **Gradle cache / OOM chyby:** Termux nemĂĄ dostatek pamÄti pro kompilaci. ĆeĆĄenĂ­m je pĆidĂĄnĂ­ `--no-daemon` k pĆĂ­kazu gradlew.
- **ZastaralĂ© UI v aplikaci:** ZapomnÄl jsi spustit `npx cap sync android` po provedenĂ­ `npm run build`.

## DoporuÄenĂœ postup ĆeĆĄenĂ­:
1. OvÄĆit, ĆŸe bÄĆŸĂ­ backend (napĆ. pĆes curl na `http://13.49.77.58:3000/api/balance`).
2. ProvĂ©st ÄistĂœ build (`npm run build`).
3. Sledovat nativnĂ­ logy pomocĂ­ ADB: `adb logcat | grep -i "capacitor"`

# Release Process

Postup vydĂĄnĂ­ novĂ© produkÄnĂ­ verze.

1. **Aktualizace konfigurace:** Zkontrolovat, ĆŸe API URL mĂ­ĆĂ­ striktnÄ na produkÄnĂ­ AWS server.
2. **Aktualizovat dokumentaci** a verze v `package.json`.
3. **Web Build:** Spustit `npm run build`.
4. **Capacitor Sync:** Spustit `npx cap sync android`.
5. **VytvoĆit Release Build:** `cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease`.
6. **Podepsat APK:** Podepsat aplikaci pomocĂ­ lokĂĄlnĂ­ho Keystore.
7. **Commit & Push:** Odeslat zmÄny na GitHub (spustĂ­ se CI/CD pro finĂĄlnĂ­ ovÄĆenĂ­).
8. **Git Tag:** VytvoĆit tag (napĆ. `v1.0.0`) a sepsat Release Notes.

KaĆŸdĂœ release musĂ­ bĂœt stoprocentnÄ dohledatelnĂœ podle Git historie a musĂ­ mĂ­t jasnÄ definovanĂœ state backendu.

# GitHub Actions CI/CD

## PĆehled
GitHub Actions slouĆŸĂ­ jako automatizovanĂĄ vĂœvojovĂĄ pipeline. ZajiĆĄĆ„uje ÄistĂœ a nezĂĄvislĂœ build mimo lokĂĄlnĂ­ Termux prostĆedĂ­.

## Architektura CI
Developer -> git push -> GitHub -> Ubuntu Runner -> NPM Build -> Capacitor Sync -> Gradle Build -> APK Artifact

## AktuĂĄlnĂ­ technologie
- GitHub Actions (Ubuntu Runner)
- Node.js (pro Vite)
- JDK 21 & Gradle 8.x
- Android SDK & Capacitor

## DoporuÄenĂ© kroky pipeline
**1. Checkout:** StaĆŸenĂ­ zdrojovĂ©ho kĂłdu (`actions/checkout`).
**2. Setup Node & Java:** PĆĂ­prava prostĆedĂ­ pro kompilaci.
**3. Instalace zĂĄvislostĂ­:** `npm install`.
**4. Frontend Build (KritickĂœ krok):** `npm run build`.
**5. Capacitor Sync:** `npx cap sync android`.
**6. Android Build:** `cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug`.

## HistorickĂ© milnĂ­ky CI
- **Gradle & JDK 21 upgrade:** PĆĂ­prava na modernĂ­ standardy.
- **OdstranÄnĂ­ Cordova zĂĄvislostĂ­:** PĆidĂĄn auditovatelnĂœ skript (bĂœvalĂœ commit e668899) pro odstranÄnĂ­ nepotĆebnĂœch pluginĆŻ, ÄĂ­mĆŸ se odlehÄil build.

## BudoucĂ­ rozĆĄĂ­ĆenĂ­
- AutomatickĂ© nahrĂĄvĂĄnĂ­ APK jako Artifactu pro okamĆŸitĂ© staĆŸenĂ­ z GitHubu.
- AutomatickĂœ deployment Node.js backendu na AWS pĆi zmÄnÄ ve vÄtvi main.

# Knowledge Base

Zde uklĂĄdĂĄme dlouhodobĂĄ zjiĆĄtÄnĂ­ a debug tipy.
- **Termux memory limit:** PĆi buildu `gradlew assembleDebug` je doporuÄeno zavĆĂ­t na telefonu nĂĄroÄnĂ© aplikace, aby Android neukonÄil proces kvĆŻli OOM (Out Of Memory).
- **Tailwind v Capacitoru:** Pamatuj, ĆŸe dynamickĂ© tĆĂ­dy se nemusĂ­ vygenerovat, pokud nejsou obsaĆŸeny v purgovĂĄnĂ­, proto se v `History.jsx` musĂ­ bezpeÄnÄ definovat barvy a stavy.

PouĆŸĂ­vĂĄme zjednoduĆĄenĂœ GitHub flow:

3. Push na GitHub slouĆŸĂ­ jako zĂĄloha a spouĆĄtÄÄ pĆĂ­padnĂœch Actions.

# Security Model

RBank pouĆŸĂ­vĂĄ "Zero Trust" model mezi frontendem a backendem.
- Frontend (React) je povaĆŸovĂĄn za nedĆŻvÄryhodnĂ© prostĆedĂ­ (lze modifikovat).
- Backend (Node.js) striktnÄ validuje kaĆŸdĂœ pĆĂ­chozĂ­ parametr.

# Authorization

PĆĂ­stupovĂĄ prĂĄva:
- BÄĆŸnĂœ uĆŸivatel smĂ­ pĆistupovat (ÄĂ­st/zapisovat) POUZE ke svĂœm vlastnĂ­m datĆŻm (ĂșÄty, transakce), kde `user_id` odpovĂ­dĂĄ JWT tokenu.
- API vrstva kontroluje vlastnictvĂ­ entity pĆi kaĆŸdĂ©m poĆŸadavku.

========================================

# Security Best Practices
- **No API Keys in Repo:** ĆœĂĄdnĂ© `.env` promÄnnĂ© nesmĂ­ bĂœt pushnutĂ© v Gitu.
- **HTTPS:** Komunikace s AWS musĂ­ bĂœt do budoucna ĆĄifrovĂĄna (SSL/TLS certifikĂĄt).
- **ProGuard:** Release build Android aplikace vyuĆŸĂ­vĂĄ ProGuard pro obfuskaci kĂłdu a snĂ­ĆŸenĂ­ velikosti APK.

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="cs">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <title>rBank Offline Revize</title>
    <style>
        /* SkrytĂ­ posuvnĂ­ku pro horizontĂĄlnĂ­ menu na mobilu, ale zachovĂĄnĂ­ scrollovĂĄnĂ­ */
        .hide-scrollbar::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
        .hide-scrollbar { -ms-overflow-style: none; scrollbar-width: none; }
    </style>
</head>
<body class="bg-[#22252e] text-white p-5 font-sans pb-24">
    <header class="flex items-center justify-between mb-4 border-b border-[#2c2f38] pb-4">
        <div>
            <h1 class="text-[19px] font-bold">Offline revize vĂœpisu</h1>
            <p class="text-[13px] text-gray-400">LokĂĄlnĂ­ Termux prostĆedĂ­</p>
        </div>
        <div class="w-10 h-10 bg-[#3b82f6] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-white shadow-lg">rB</div>
    </header>

    <!-- OvlĂĄdacĂ­ panel -->
    <div class="mb-5 space-y-3 sticky top-0 bg-[#22252e] pt-2 z-10">
        <div class="flex justify-between items-center">
            <h2 class="text-[15px] font-semibold text-slate-200">Filtrovat mÄsĂ­c</h2>
            <button id="sort-btn" class="text-[13px] text-[#3b82f6] font-medium px-4 py-2 bg-[#3b82f6]/10 rounded-xl active:bg-[#3b82f6]/20 transition-colors">
                âŒ NejnovÄjĆĄĂ­
            </button>
        </div>
        <!-- MÄsĂ­ce (horizontĂĄlnĂ­ dotykovĂœ scroll) -->
        <div id="month-tabs" class="flex overflow-x-auto gap-2 pb-2 hide-scrollbar"></div>
    </div>

    <div id="container" class="space-y-4">
        <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm text-center">NaÄĂ­tĂĄm vyparsovanĂĄ data...</p>
    </div>

    <script>
        let allTx = [];
        let currentSort = 'desc'; // 'desc' = nejnovÄjĆĄĂ­ prvnĂ­, 'asc' = nejstarĆĄĂ­ prvnĂ­
        let selectedMonth = 'all'; // 'all' nebo ÄĂ­slo 1-12

        const months = ["VĆĄe", "Leden", "Ănor", "BĆezen", "Duben", "KvÄten", "Äerven", "Äervenec", "Srpen", "ZĂĄĆĂ­", "ĆĂ­jen", "Listopad", "Prosinec"];

        // PĆevod stringu "6. 7. 2025" na milisekundy pro matematickĂ© ĆazenĂ­
        const parseDate = (dStr) => {
            if (!dStr) return 0;
            const parts = dStr.split('.').map(x => parseInt(x.trim()));
            if (parts.length === 3) {
                // Rok, MÄsĂ­c (0-11), Den
                return new Date(parts[2], parts[1] - 1, parts[0]).getTime();
            }
            return 0;
        };

        const renderTabs = () => {
            const tabsHtml = months.map((m, idx) => {
                const val = idx === 0 ? 'all' : idx;
                const isActive = selectedMonth === val;
                const bgClass = isActive 
                    ? 'bg-[#3b82f6] text-white shadow-lg shadow-blue-500/20' 
                    : 'bg-[#2c2f38] text-gray-400 border border-[#3e424c]';
                
                return `<button onclick="setMonth('${val}')" class="whitespace-nowrap px-5 py-2 rounded-xl text-[13px] font-medium transition-colors ${bgClass}">${m}</button>`;
            }).join('');
            document.getElementById('month-tabs').innerHTML = tabsHtml;
        };

        // VystavenĂ­ funkce do globĂĄlnĂ­ho scope pro onclick tlaÄĂ­tka
        window.setMonth = (val) => {
            selectedMonth = val === 'all' ? 'all' : parseInt(val);
            renderTabs();
            renderTransactions();
        };

        document.getElementById('sort-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            currentSort = currentSort === 'desc' ? 'asc' : 'desc';
            document.getElementById('sort-btn').innerHTML = currentSort === 'desc' ? 'âŒ NejnovÄjĆĄĂ­' : 'âČ NejstarĆĄĂ­';
            renderTransactions();
        });

        const renderTransactions = () => {
            const cont = document.getElementById('container');
            
            // 1. Filtrace podle mÄsĂ­ce
            let filtered = allTx.filter(tx => {
                if (selectedMonth === 'all') return true;
                if (!tx.real_date) return false;
                
                const parts = tx.real_date.split('.').map(x => parseInt(x.trim()));
                return parts.length === 3 && parts[1] === selectedMonth;
            });

            // 2. ĆazenĂ­ podle data
            filtered.sort((a, b) => {
                const timeA = parseDate(a.real_date);
                const timeB = parseDate(b.real_date);
                return currentSort === 'desc' ? timeB - timeA : timeA - timeB;
            });

            // 3. VykreslenĂ­
            if (filtered.length === 0) {
                cont.innerHTML = '<p class="text-gray-400 text-[14px] text-center py-10">V tomto obdobĂ­ nejsou ĆŸĂĄdnĂ© transakce.</p>';
                return;
            }
            
            cont.innerHTML = filtered.map(tx => `
                <div class="bg-[#2c2f38] p-4 rounded-xl flex justify-between items-center shadow-lg border border-[#3e424c]">
                    <div class="flex-1 pr-4">
                        <p class="font-semibold text-[15px] leading-tight mb-1 text-slate-200">${tx.name}</p>
                        <p class="text-[12px] text-gray-400 leading-tight">${tx.type}</p>
                    </div>
                    <div class="text-right shrink-0">
                        <p class="font-bold text-[15px] ${tx.color}">${tx.amount} CZK</p>
                        <p class="text-[11px] text-gray-500 mt-1">${tx.real_date}</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            `).join('');
        };

        // NaÄtenĂ­ dat pĆi startu
        fetch('transactions.json')
            .then(r => r.json())
            .then(data => {
                allTx = data;
                renderTabs();
                renderTransactions();
            })
            .catch(err => {
                document.getElementById('container').innerHTML = '<p class="text-red-400 text-sm text-center">Chyba pĆi naÄĂ­tĂĄnĂ­ dat. UjistÄte se, ĆŸe JSON existuje.</p>';
            });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

 FILE: offline_parser/run.js
========================================
const fs = require('fs');
const path = require('path');
const http = require('http');
const { exec } = require('child_process');
const PDFParser = require('pdf2json');

const INPUT_DIR = path.join(process.env.HOME, 'vypisy');
const BASE_DIR = path.join(process.env.HOME, 'rbank', 'offline_parser');
const OUTPUT_DATA = path.join(BASE_DIR, 'transactions.json');

const forceClean = (text) => {
    try { return decodeURIComponent(text); }
    catch (e) { return text.replace(/%[0-9A-F]{2}/g, '').replace(/[^\x20-\x7E\u00C0-\u017F]/g, ''); }
};

async function parseFile(filePath) {
    return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
        const pdfParser = new PDFParser();
        pdfParser.on("pdfParser_dataError", err => reject(err));
        pdfParser.on("pdfParser_dataReady", data => resolve(data));
        pdfParser.loadPDF(filePath);
    });
}

async function processPDFs() {
    if (!fs.existsSync(INPUT_DIR)) fs.mkdirSync(INPUT_DIR, { recursive: true });
    const files = fs.readdirSync(INPUT_DIR).filter(f => f.toLowerCase().endsWith('.pdf'));
    let allTransactions = [];

    if (files.length === 0) {
        console.log(`[!] SloĆŸka ${INPUT_DIR} neobsahuje ĆŸĂĄdnĂĄ PDF.`);
        fs.writeFileSync(OUTPUT_DATA, JSON.stringify([], null, 2));
        return;
    }

    const STOP_KEYWORDS = /Raiffeisenbank|V rĂĄmci souhrnnĂ© poloĆŸky|PĆehled pohledavek|ZprĂĄva pro klienta|ZaplacenĂ© poplatky|ZaplacenĂ© Ășroky|PĆipsanĂ© Ășroky|ZĂĄkladnĂ­ ĂșrokovĂĄ sazba|BezĂșroÄnĂĄ rezerva|EQUA ĂșÄet|VedenĂ­ debetnĂ­|Informace o ĂșrocĂ­ch|PĆehled poplatkĆŻ/i;

    for (const file of files) {
        console.log(`[>] ParsovĂĄnĂ­ dokumentu: ${file}...`);
        const data = await parseFile(path.join(INPUT_DIR, file));
        
        (data.Pages || []).forEach(page => {
            let rawElements = [];
            let ignoreAboveY = 0;
            let ignoreBelowY = 999999;
            let isFirstPage = false;

            (page.Texts || []).forEach(t => {
                let text = forceClean(t.R[0].T).trim();
                if (/^Strana\s*1\//i.test(text)) isFirstPage = true;
            });

            (page.Texts || []).forEach(t => {
                let text = forceClean(t.R[0].T).trim();
                if (text === '.' || text === '-' || text === '' || /^Strana/i.test(text)) return;
                
                if (/K0000\d+/i.test(text) || text.includes('âą')) return;
                
                let x = Math.round(t.x * 100);
                let y = Math.round(t.y * 100);

                if ((isFirstPage && /VĂœpis pohybĆŻ|Kategorie transakce/i.test(text)) || (!isFirstPage && /Kategorie transakce/i.test(text))) {
                    if (y > ignoreAboveY) ignoreAboveY = y + 20;
                }
                
                if (STOP_KEYWORDS.test(text)) {
                    if (y < ignoreBelowY) ignoreBelowY = y - 20;
                }
                
                rawElements.push({ x, y, text });
            });

            let elements = rawElements.filter(e => e.y > ignoreAboveY && e.y < ignoreBelowY);
            
            let boundaries = elements.filter(e => 
                e.x > 2500 && 
                /[-âââ]?[\d\s]+\.\d{2}/.test(e.text) && 
                !/[a-zA-Z]{3}/.test(e.text.replace(/CZK/i, ''))
            ).map(e => e.y).sort((a, b) => a - b);

            for (let i = 0; i < boundaries.length; i++) {
                let startY = boundaries[i];
                let endY = (i + 1 < boundaries.length) ? boundaries[i+1] : startY + 500;
                let blockEls = elements.filter(e => e.y >= startY - 10 && e.y < endY - 10);
                
                let col1Raw = blockEls.filter(e => e.x < 500).sort((a,b) => a.y - b.y).map(e => e.text);
                let col2Raw = blockEls.filter(e => e.x >= 500 && e.x < 1200).sort((a,b) => a.y - b.y).map(e => e.text);
                let col3Raw = blockEls.filter(e => e.x >= 1200 && e.x < 2200).sort((a,b) => a.y - b.y).map(e => e.text);
                
                let amountEls = blockEls.filter(e => e.x >= 2500 && /[-âââ]?[\d\s]+\.\d{2}/.test(e.text)).sort((a,b) => a.y - b.y);
                if (amountEls.length === 0) continue;
                
                let val = parseFloat(amountEls[0].text.replace(/[\s\xA0a-zA-Z]/g, '').replace(/[-âââ]/, '-'));
                if (isNaN(val)) continue;

                // --- VYLEPĆ ENĂ LOGIKA EXTRAKCE JMEN A TYPĆź ---
                // 1. OpatrnĂ© oddÄlenĂ­ kategorie
                let category = col2Raw.length > 0 ? col2Raw[0] : '';
                // ZbavĂ­me se pouze jmĂ©na uĆŸivatele, nezahazujeme uĆŸ ÄĂ­sla ĂșÄtĆŻ
                let col2Filtered = col2Raw.slice(1).filter(t => !/ZBYNÄK|KOCIĂN/i.test(t));
                
                // 2. Filtrace zbyteÄnĂœch ÄĂ­sel (VS, KS, pĆŻvodnĂ­ mÄny) z poznĂĄmek
                let col3Filtered = col3Raw.filter(t => 
                    !/^[\d\s\-\/]+$/.test(t) && 
                    !/^(VS|KS|SS):/i.test(t) && 
                    !/(PK|PC)[:\s]*[\wX]+/i.test(t) && 
                    !/MĂ­sto:|ÄĂĄstka:/i.test(t)
                );

                // 3. SklĂĄdĂĄnĂ­ jmĂ©na: ÄĂ­slo ĂșÄtu / NĂĄzev protiĂșÄtu
                let finalName = col2Filtered.join(' - '); 
                let extras = col3Filtered.slice(1).join(' | '); // PĆĂ­padnĂĄ zprĂĄva/poznĂĄmka

                // Pokud nemĂĄme protiĂșÄet, pouĆŸijeme poznĂĄmku, jinak pĆipojĂ­me poznĂĄmku k protiĂșÄtu
                if (!finalName) {
                    finalName = extras ? extras : 'NeznĂĄmĂœ obchodnĂ­k';
                } else if (extras) {
                    finalName += ` | ${extras}`;
                }

                // 4. SklĂĄdĂĄnĂ­ typu: Kombinace transakce a kategorie
                let typeText = col3Filtered.length > 0 ? col3Filtered[0] : category;
                let finalType = typeText || 'Platba';
                // Pokud mĂĄme kategorii (napĆ. "Platba") a typ (napĆ. "PĆĂ­chozĂ­ Ășhrada"), spojĂ­me je
                if (category && category !== typeText && !typeText.includes(category)) {
                    finalType = `${typeText} (${category})`;
                }
                // ---------------------------------------------

                allTransactions.push({ 
                    id: Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9),
                    real_date: col1Raw[0] || '',
                    name: finalName,
                    type: finalType,
                    amount: (val > 0 ? "+" : "") + val.toLocaleString('cs-CZ', {minimumFractionDigits: 2}),
                    color: val > 0 ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-slate-100'
                });
            }
        });
    }

    fs.writeFileSync(OUTPUT_DATA, JSON.stringify(allTransactions, null, 2));
    console.log(`\n[v] ExtrahovĂĄno a uloĆŸeno ${allTransactions.length} transakcĂ­.`);
}

function startServerAndBrowser() {
    const server = http.createServer((req, res) => {
        let filePath = path.join(BASE_DIR, req.url === '/' ? 'index.html' : req.url);
        let extname = path.extname(filePath);
        let contentType = 'text/html';
        if (extname === '.json') contentType = 'application/json';

        fs.readFile(filePath, (err, content) => {
            if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('Soubor nenalezen'); }
            else { res.writeHead(200, { 'Content-Type': contentType }); res.end(content, 'utf-8'); }
        });
    });

    server.listen(3000, () => {
        console.log('\n=============================================');
        console.log('LokĂĄlnĂ­ server bÄĆŸĂ­ na: http://localhost:3000');
        console.log('=============================================');
        exec('termux-open-url http://localhost:3000');
    });
}

async function init() {
    await processPDFs();
    startServerAndBrowser();
}

init();

Ž>7©8”Ń%ÛùjÚkhĐarÄ;WđÄsÍ+”;°/g>t)XńkÓzDÁTë«Ńfłï<Ä;+ńÎłKŒó(a
wlâxçč'ȚywÂ€xç)ȚywšÂŹçyûÆ”8qćÿwÆâłpçY-Țytwäâ»pç9/Üyìwą_BjêÓĆ§wÂ]'pŚ"ÜuŸ|7b\ÊĆìŻĂ(	đ"u	wMą]GpŚÉ%ÚuÁŻsÍŐ[±ÇYoÊŚvóuÌ]{Suê	w©EXIF"␀␀␀II*␀␀␀␀␀1␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀␀Picasa␀␀

 FILE: src/App.jsx

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import { App as CapacitorApp } from '@capacitor/app';
import PinScreen from './components/PinScreen';
import { Toast } from '@capacitor/toast';

import Dashboard from './pages/Dashboard';
import History from './pages/History';
import { Payment, CardDetail, SavingsGoals, BuildingSavings } from './pages/BankingModules';
import { 
  Offers, InfoZone, Menu, Profile,
  TravelInsurance, MinuteLoan, SystemOutage,
  ExchangeRates, BranchesATMs, AppSettings, Support
} from './pages/UserModules';

function BackButtonHandler() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const currentPath = useRef(location.pathname);
  const lastBackPress = useRef(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    currentPath.current = location.pathname;
  }, [location.pathname]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleBackButton = async () => {
      if (currentPath.current === '/') {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        if (now - lastBackPress.current < 2000) {
          await CapacitorApp.exitApp();
        } else {
          lastBackPress.current = now;
          await Toast.show({
            text: 'StisknÄte ZpÄt jeĆĄtÄ jednou pro ukonÄenĂ­',
            duration: 'short',
            position: 'bottom'
          });
        }
      } else {
        navigate(-1);
      }
    };

    const listenerPromise = CapacitorApp.addListener('backButton', handleBackButton);

    return () => {
      listenerPromise.then(listener => listener.remove());
    };
  }, [navigate]);

  return null;
}

export default function App() {
  const [authenticated, setAuthenticated] = React.useState(false);

  if (!authenticated) {
    return <PinScreen onAuthenticated={() => setAuthenticated(true)} />;
  }

  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <BackButtonHandler />
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<Dashboard />} />
        <Route path="/history" element={<History />} />
        <Route path="/payment" element={<Payment />} />
        <Route path="/offers" element={<Offers />} />
        <Route path="/info" element={<InfoZone />} />
        <Route path="/menu" element={<Menu />} />
        <Route path="/profile" element={<Profile />} />
        <Route path="/savings-goals" element={<SavingsGoals />} />
        <Route path="/building-savings" element={<BuildingSavings />} />
        <Route path="/card" element={<CardDetail />} />
        
        {/* NovĂ© mock routy */}
        <Route path="/travel-insurance" element={<TravelInsurance />} />
        <Route path="/minute-loan" element={<MinuteLoan />} />
        <Route path="/system-outage" element={<SystemOutage />} />
        <Route path="/exchange-rates" element={<ExchangeRates />} />
        <Route path="/branches" element={<BranchesATMs />} />
        <Route path="/settings" element={<AppSettings />} />
        <Route path="/support" element={<Support />} />
      </Routes>
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

========================================
 FILE: src/App.jsx.bak

import React, { useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { BrowserRouter, Routes, Route, useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';
import { App as CapacitorApp } from '@capacitor/app';
import { Toast } from '@capacitor/toast';

import Dashboard from './pages/Dashboard';
import History from './pages/History';
import { Payment, CardDetail, SavingsGoals, BuildingSavings } from './pages/BankingModules';
import { 
  Offers, InfoZone, Menu, Profile,
  TravelInsurance, MinuteLoan, SystemOutage,
  ExchangeRates, BranchesATMs, AppSettings, Support
} from './pages/UserModules';

function BackButtonHandler() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const location = useLocation();
  const currentPath = useRef(location.pathname);
  const lastBackPress = useRef(0);

  useEffect(() => {
    currentPath.current = location.pathname;
  }, [location.pathname]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleBackButton = async () => {
      if (currentPath.current === '/') {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        if (now - lastBackPress.current < 2000) {
          await CapacitorApp.exitApp();
        } else {
          lastBackPress.current = now;
          await Toast.show({
            text: 'StisknÄte ZpÄt jeĆĄtÄ jednou pro ukonÄenĂ­',
            duration: 'short',
            position: 'bottom'
          });
        }
      } else {
        navigate(-1);
      }
    };

    const listenerPromise = CapacitorApp.addListener('backButton', handleBackButton);

    return () => {
      listenerPromise.then(listener => listener.remove());
    };
  }, [navigate]);

  return null;
}

export default function App() {
  return (
    <BrowserRouter>
      <BackButtonHandler />
      <Routes>
        <Route path="/" element={<Dashboard />} />
        <Route path="/history" element={<History />} />
        <Route path="/payment" element={<Payment />} />
        <Route path="/offers" element={<Offers />} />
        <Route path="/info" element={<InfoZone />} />
        <Route path="/menu" element={<Menu />} />
        <Route path="/profile" element={<Profile />} />
        <Route path="/savings-goals" element={<SavingsGoals />} />
        <Route path="/building-savings" element={<BuildingSavings />} />
        <Route path="/card" element={<CardDetail />} />
        
        {/* NovĂ© mock routy */}
        <Route path="/travel-insurance" element={<TravelInsurance />} />
        <Route path="/minute-loan" element={<MinuteLoan />} />
        <Route path="/system-outage" element={<SystemOutage />} />
        <Route path="/exchange-rates" element={<ExchangeRates />} />
        <Route path="/branches" element={<BranchesATMs />} />
        <Route path="/settings" element={<AppSettings />} />
        <Route path="/support" element={<Support />} />
      </Routes>
    </BrowserRouter>
  );
}

 FILE: src/components/BottomNav.jsx

import React from 'react';
import { useNavigate, useLocation } from 'react-router-dom';

export default function BottomNav() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const { pathname } = useLocation();

  const navItems = [
    { path: '/', label: 'PĆehled', icon: <path d="M12 3L4 9v12h5v-7h6v7h5V9z" />, isFill: true },
    { path: '/payment', label: 'Platba', icon: <path d="M14 7h5v5M19 7l-7 7M10 17H5v-5M5 17l7-7" />, isFill: false },
    { path: '/offers', label: 'NabĂ­dky', icon: <path d="M3 3h2l.4 2M7 13h10l4-8H5.4M7 13L5.4 5M7 13l-2.293 2.293c-.63.63-.184 1.707.707 1.707H17m0 0a2 2 0 100 4 2 2 0 000-4zm-8 2a2 2 0 11-4 0 2 2 0 014 0z"/>, isFill: false },
    { path: '/info', label: 'InfoZĂłna', icon: <><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z" /><path d="M9 9l6 6M15 9l-6 6" /></>, isFill: false },
    { path: '/menu', label: 'Menu', icon: <><circle cx="5" cy="12" r="1.5" /><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="1.5" /><circle cx="19" cy="12" r="1.5" /></>, isFill: true }
  ];

  return (
    <nav className="fixed bottom-0 z-50 w-full bg-[#22252e] flex justify-between px-2 pb-2 pt-3 border-t border-[#2c2f38]">
      {navItems.map((item) => {
        const isActive = pathname === item.path;
        return (
          <button key={item.path} onClick={() => navigate(item.path)} className={`flex flex-col items-center gap-1 w-16 ${isActive ? '' : 'mt-1.5'}`}>
            {isActive ? (
              <div className="bg-[#3e424c] px-4 py-1.5 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-0.5 text-white">
                <svg className="w-[20px] h-[20px]" fill={item.isFill ? "currentColor" : "none"} stroke={item.isFill ? "none" : "currentColor"} strokeWidth={item.isFill ? "0" : "2"} strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24">{item.icon}</svg>
              </div>
            ) : (
              <svg className="w-[22px] h-[22px] mb-1 text-gray-400" fill={item.isFill ? "currentColor" : "none"} stroke={item.isFill ? "none" : "currentColor"} strokeWidth={item.isFill ? "0" : "2"} strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24">{item.icon}</svg>
            )}
            <span className={`text-[10px] ${isActive ? 'font-medium text-white' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>{item.label}</span>
          </button>
        );
      })}
    </nav>
  );
}

========================================
 FILE: src/components/PinScreen.jsx
========================================
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Preferences } from '@capacitor/preferences';

export default function PinScreen({ onAuthenticated }) {
  const [pin, setPin] = useState('');
  const [isFirstSetup, setIsFirstSetup] = useState(false);
  const [askBiometrics, setAskBiometrics] = useState(false);
  const [isBiometricEnabled, setIsBiometricEnabled] = useState(false);

  // Inicializace stavu pĆi naÄtenĂ­
  useEffect(() => {
    const init = async () => {
      const pinRes = await Preferences.get({ key: 'user_pin' });
      const bioRes = await Preferences.get({ key: 'biometric_enabled' });
      
      if (!pinRes.value) {
        setIsFirstSetup(true);
      } else {
        const bioEnabled = bioRes.value === 'true';
        setIsBiometricEnabled(bioEnabled);
        
        // Pokud mĂĄ uĆŸivatel biometrii povolenou, zkusĂ­me ji vyvolat
        if (bioEnabled) {
          triggerBiometricAuth();
        }
      }
    };
    init();
  }, []);

  const triggerBiometricAuth = () => {
    // ZatĂ­m jen log, dokud neimplementujeme stabilnĂ­ AndroidX knihovnu
    console.log('Biometrie vyvolĂĄna (na zĂĄkladÄ pĆedchozĂ­ho souhlasu uĆŸivatele).');
  };

  const handleDigit = (digit) => {
    if (pin.length < 4) setPin(prev => prev + digit);
  };

  const handleBackspace = () => setPin(prev => prev.slice(0, -1));

  const processPin = async () => {
    if (isFirstSetup) {
      // UloĆŸenĂ­ novĂ©ho PINu a pĆechod na ĆŸĂĄdost o biometrii
      await Preferences.set({ key: 'user_pin', value: pin });
      setAskBiometrics(true);
    } else {
      // StandardnĂ­ ovÄĆenĂ­
      const { value } = await Preferences.get({ key: 'user_pin' });
      if (pin === value) {
        onAuthenticated();
      } else { 
        setPin(''); 
        alert('NeplatnĂœ S-PIN'); 
      }
    }
  };

  const handleBiometricChoice = async (choice) => {
    // UloĆŸenĂ­ souhlasu/nesouhlasu
    await Preferences.set({ key: 'biometric_enabled', value: choice ? 'true' : 'false' });
    
    // ProvĂĄzĂĄnĂ­ s nastavenĂ­m v sekci "MĆŻj profil" (aby byl pĆepĂ­naÄ synchronizovanĂœ)
    const settingsRes = await Preferences.get({ key: 'user_settings' });
    let settings = settingsRes.value ? JSON.parse(settingsRes.value) : { push: true, biometric: choice, darkMode: true };
    settings.biometric = choice;
    await Preferences.set({ key: 'user_settings', value: JSON.stringify(settings) });

    onAuthenticated();
  };

  // VykreslenĂ­: ZobrazenĂ­ ĆŸĂĄdosti o souhlas s biometriĂ­
  if (askBiometrics) {
    return (
      <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-[#22252e] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white z-50 px-6">
        <div className="w-[72px] h-[72px] bg-[#3e424c] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-8 text-[#fcd535] shadow-lg">
          <svg className="w-10 h-10" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 11c0 3.517-1.009 6.799-2.753 9.571m-3.44-2.04l.054-.09A13.916 13.916 0 008 11a4 4 0 118 0c0 1.017-.07 2.019-.203 2.99m-2.118 3.424A13.91 13.91 0 0112 21a13.91 13.91 0 01-5.59-1.536"/></svg>
        </div>
        <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4 text-center">PĆihlĂĄĆĄenĂ­ otiskem</h2>
        <p className="text-gray-400 text-center text-[15px] mb-12 leading-relaxed max-w-sm">
          Chcete si usnadnit pĆĂ­stup k financĂ­m a pro pĆĂ­ĆĄtĂ­ pĆihlĂĄĆĄenĂ­ pouĆŸĂ­vat otisk prstu mĂ­sto S-PINu?
        </p>
        <button onClick={() => handleBiometricChoice(true)} className="w-full max-w-sm bg-[#fcd535] text-black font-bold py-4 rounded-[16px] mb-4 active:bg-[#e5c02a] transition-colors">
          Ano, povolit otisk
        </button>
        <button onClick={() => handleBiometricChoice(false)} className="w-full max-w-sm bg-[#2c2f38] text-white font-bold py-4 rounded-[16px] active:bg-[#3e424c] transition-colors">
          Ne, dÄkuji
        </button>
      </div>
    );
  }

  // VykreslenĂ­: ÄĂ­selnĂ­k
  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-[#22252e] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white z-50">
      <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-8">{isFirstSetup ? 'VytvoĆte si novĂœ S-PIN' : 'Zadejte S-PIN'}</h2>
      
      <div className="flex gap-4 mb-12">
        {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className={`w-4 h-4 rounded-full transition-colors ${pin.length > i ? 'bg-[#fcd535]' : 'bg-[#3e424c]'}`} />
        ))}
      </div>
      
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
        {[1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9].map(d => (
          <button key={d} onClick={() => handleDigit(d)} className="w-[68px] h-[68px] rounded-full bg-[#2c2f38] text-2xl font-semibold active:bg-[#3e424c] transition-colors">{d}</button>
        ))}
        
        {/* Pokud je biometrie zakĂĄzanĂĄ v nastavenĂ­, ikonu senzoru vĆŻbec neukazujeme */}
        <div className="flex items-center justify-center">
          {isBiometricEnabled && !isFirstSetup ? (
            <button onClick={triggerBiometricAuth} className="w-[68px] h-[68px] flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 active:text-[#fcd535] transition-colors">
               <svg className="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 11c0 3.517-1.009 6.799-2.753 9.571m-3.44-2.04l.054-.09A13.916 13.916 0 008 11a4 4 0 118 0c0 1.017-.07 2.019-.203 2.99m-2.118 3.424A13.91 13.91 0 0112 21a13.91 13.91 0 01-5.59-1.536"/></svg>
            </button>
          ) : <div className="w-[68px] h-[68px]"></div>}
        </div>
        
        <button onClick={() => handleDigit(0)} className="w-[68px] h-[68px] rounded-full bg-[#2c2f38] text-2xl font-semibold active:bg-[#3e424c] transition-colors">0</button>
        
        <button onClick={handleBackspace} className="w-[68px] h-[68px] flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400 active:text-white transition-colors">
          <svg className="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 14l2-2m0 0l2-2m-2 2l-2-2m2 2l2 2M3 12l6.414 6.414a2 2 0 001.414.586H19a2 2 0 002-2V7a2 2 0 00-2-2h-8.172a2 2 0 00-1.414.586L3 12z"/></svg>
        </button>
      </div>

      <button 
        onClick={processPin} 
        disabled={pin.length !== 4}
        className={`w-56 font-bold py-[14px] rounded-[16px] transition-all duration-300 ${pin.length === 4 ? 'bg-[#fcd535] text-black shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(252,213,53,0.3)]' : 'bg-[#2c2f38] text-gray-500'}`}
      >
        {isFirstSetup ? 'Potvrdit S-PIN' : 'PĆihlĂĄsit se'}
      </button>
    </div>
  );
}

========================================
 FILE: src/components/PinScreen.jsx.bak
========================================
import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { Preferences } from '@capacitor/preferences';

export default function PinScreen({ onAuthenticated }) {
  const [pin, setPin] = useState('');
  
  const handleAuth = () => {
    console.log('Biometrie kliknuta - momentĂĄlnÄ deaktivovĂĄna kvĆŻli stabilitÄ.');
    // Zde bude v budoucnu bezpeÄnÄjĆĄĂ­ AndroidX implementace
  };

  const handleDigit = (digit) => {
    if (pin.length < 4) setPin(prev => prev + digit);
  };

  const handleBackspace = () => setPin(prev => prev.slice(0, -1));

  const checkPin = async () => {
    const { value } = await Preferences.get({ key: 'user_pin' });
    
    if (!value && pin.length === 4) {
      await Preferences.set({ key: 'user_pin', value: pin });
      onAuthenticated();
    } else if (pin === value) {
      onAuthenticated();
    } else { 
      setPin(''); 
      alert('Ć patnĂœ PIN'); 
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="fixed inset-0 bg-[#22252e] flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-white z-50">
      <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold mb-8">Zadejte S-PIN</h2>
      <div className="flex gap-4 mb-12">
        {[...Array(4)].map((_, i) => (
          <div key={i} className={`w-4 h-4 rounded-full ${pin.length > i ? 'bg-[#fcd535]' : 'bg-[#3e424c]'}`} />
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6 mb-8">
        {[1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8,9].map(d => (
          <button key={d} onClick={() => handleDigit(d)} className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#2c2f38] text-xl font-bold active:bg-[#3e424c]">{d}</button>
        ))}
        <button onClick={handleAuth} className="w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">
           <svg className="w-8 h-8" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M12 11c0 3.517-1.009 6.799-2.753 9.571m-3.44-2.04l.054-.09A13.916 13.916 0 008 11a4 4 0 118 0c0 1.017-.07 2.019-.203 2.99m-2.118 3.424A13.91 13.91 0 0112 21a13.91 13.91 0 01-5.59-1.536"/></svg>
        </button>
        <button onClick={() => handleDigit(0)} className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-[#2c2f38] text-xl font-bold active:bg-[#3e424c]">0</button>
        <button onClick={handleBackspace} className="w-16 h-16 flex items-center justify-center text-gray-400">â«</button>
      </div>
      <button onClick={checkPin} className="w-48 bg-[#fcd535] text-black font-bold py-3 rounded-full">PĆihlĂĄsit</button>
    </div>
  );
}

export const fetchMockTransactions = async (page) => {
  return new Promise((resolve) => {
    setTimeout(() => {
      // VytvoĆĂ­me unikĂĄtnĂ­ ID pro novĂ© poloĆŸky na zĂĄkladÄ strĂĄnky
      const paginatedData = mockTransactions.map(tx => ({
        ...tx,
        id: `${tx.id}-${page}`
      }));
      resolve(paginatedData);
    }, 800); // Simulace zpoĆŸdÄnĂ­ databĂĄze 800ms
  });
};

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import BottomNav from '../components/BottomNav';

export function Payment() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [amount, setAmount] = useState('');
  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!name || !amount) return;
    setIsSubmitting(true);

    const formattedAmount = `-${parseFloat(amount).toLocaleString('cs-CZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;

    const payload = {
      name: name,
      type: 'OdchozĂ­ Ășhrada',
      amount: formattedAmount,
      subAmount: message || '',
      color: 'text-white',
      iconBg: 'bg-[#3e424c]',
      icon: 'đž',
      badge: 'đ€'
    };

    try {
      const res = await fetch('https://opravyslavkov.shop/api/transactions', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'Authorization': 'Basic ' + btoa('rbank:TajneHeslo2026')
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      if (res.ok) {
        navigate('/history');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Chyba odeslĂĄnĂ­ platby:', err);
    }
    setIsSubmitting(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white pb-24 font-sans flex flex-col">
      <header className="flex items-center p-4 pt-8 border-b border-[#2c2f38] pb-4">
        <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="text-[#3b82f6] mr-4 p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full">
          <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg>
        </button>
        <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold">NovĂĄ platba</h1>
      </header>
      <main className="flex-1 px-4 mt-6">
        <div className="bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-[24px] p-5 shadow-lg">
          <label className="text-[13px] text-gray-400 font-medium">PĆĂ­jemce / ÄĂ­slo ĂșÄtu</label>
          <input value={name} onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)} type="text" placeholder="PĆedÄĂ­slĂ­-ÄĂ­slo/KĂłd banky" className="w-full bg-transparent border-b border-gray-600 text-white text-[17px] py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#3b82f6] mb-6" />

          <label className="text-[13px] text-gray-400 font-medium">ÄĂĄstka</label>
          <div className="flex items-end border-b border-gray-600 focus-within:border-[#3b82f6] mb-6 pb-2">
            <input value={amount} onChange={(e) => setAmount(e.target.value)} type="number" placeholder="0" className="w-full bg-transparent text-white text-[32px] font-bold focus:outline-none" />
            <span className="text-[17px] text-gray-300 mb-1 ml-2">CZK</span>
          </div>

          <label className="text-[13px] text-gray-400 font-medium">ZprĂĄva pro pĆĂ­jemce</label>
          <input value={message} onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)} type="text" placeholder="VolitelnĂ©" className="w-full bg-transparent border-b border-gray-600 text-white text-[15px] py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#3b82f6] mb-8" />

          <button onClick={handleSubmit} disabled={isSubmitting || !name || !amount} className="w-full bg-[#fcd535] text-black text-[15px] font-semibold py-4 rounded-xl active:bg-yellow-500 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50">
            {isSubmitting ? 'OdesĂ­lĂĄm...' : 'Odeslat platbu'}
          </button>
        </div>
      </main>
      <BottomNav />
    </div>
  );
}

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import BottomNav from '../components/BottomNav';

export function Payment() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [name, setName] = useState('');
  const [amount, setAmount] = useState('');
  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!name || !amount) return;
    setIsSubmitting(true);

    const formattedAmount = `-${parseFloat(amount).toLocaleString('cs-CZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })}`;

    const payload = {
      name: name,
      type: 'OdchozĂ­ Ășhrada',
      amount: formattedAmount,
      subAmount: message || '',
      color: 'text-white',
      iconBg: 'bg-[#3e424c]',
      icon: 'đž',
      badge: 'đ€'
    };

    try {
      const res = await fetch('http://13.49.77.58:3000/api/transactions', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(payload)
      });
      if (res.ok) {
        navigate('/history');
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Chyba odeslĂĄnĂ­ platby:', err);
    }
    setIsSubmitting(false);
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white pb-24 font-sans flex flex-col">
      <header className="flex items-center p-4 pt-8 border-b border-[#2c2f38] pb-4">
        <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="text-[#3b82f6] mr-4 p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full"><svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg></button>
        <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold">NovĂĄ platba</h1>
      </header>
      <main className="flex-1 px-4 mt-6">
        <div className="bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-[24px] p-5 shadow-lg">
          <label className="text-[13px] text-gray-400 font-medium">PĆĂ­jemce / ÄĂ­slo ĂșÄtu</label>
          <input value={name} onChange={(e) => setName(e.target.value)} type="text" placeholder="PĆedÄĂ­slĂ­-ÄĂ­slo/KĂłd banky" className="w-full bg-transparent border-b border-gray-600 text-white text-[17px] py-3 focus:outline-none focus:border-[#3b82f6] mb-6" />

========================================
 FILE: src/pages/Dashboard.jsx
========================================
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import BottomNav from '../components/BottomNav';
import { Clipboard } from '@capacitor/clipboard';
import { Toast } from '@capacitor/toast';

export default function Dashboard() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    // BezpeÄnĂ© volĂĄnĂ­ HTTPS API s Basic Auth hlaviÄkou
    fetch('https://opravyslavkov.shop/api/balance', {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': 'Basic ' + btoa('rbank:TajneHeslo2026'),
        'Accept': 'application/json'
      }
    })
      .then(res => {
        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP chyba: ${res.status}`);
        return res.json();
      })
      .then(data => setBalance(data.balance))
      .catch(err => console.error("Chyba naÄĂ­tĂĄnĂ­ zĆŻstatku:", err));
  }, []);

  const handleCopy = async (text) => {
    try {
      await Clipboard.write({ string: text });
      await Toast.show({ text: `ZkopĂ­rovĂĄno: ${text}`, duration: 'short', position: 'bottom' });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('KopĂ­rovĂĄnĂ­ selhalo', err);

========================================

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import BottomNav from '../components/BottomNav';
import { Clipboard } from '@capacitor/clipboard';
import { Toast } from '@capacitor/toast';

export default function Dashboard() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [balance, setBalance] = useState(null);

  useEffect(() => {
    // Adresa pĆesmÄrovĂĄna na AWS server
    fetch('http://13.49.77.58:3000/api/balance')
      .then(res => res.json())
      .then(data => setBalance(data.balance))
      .catch(err => console.error("Chyba naÄĂ­tĂĄnĂ­ zĆŻstatku:", err));
  }, []);

  const handleCopy = async (text) => {
    try {
      await Clipboard.write({ string: text });
      await Toast.show({ text: `ZkopĂ­rovĂĄno: ${text}`, duration: 'short', position: 'bottom' });
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('KopĂ­rovĂĄnĂ­ selhalo', err);
    }
  };

  const formattedBalance = balance !== null
    ? new Intl.NumberFormat('cs-CZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }).format(balance)
    : '...';

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white pb-24 font-sans">
      <header className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 pt-8 mb-6">
        <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
          <img src="/logo.webp" alt="rBank Logo" className="w-12 h-12 rounded-full object-cover shadow-lg" />
          <div>
            <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold leading-tight">ZbynÄk KociĂĄn</h1>

========================================
 FILE: src/pages/History.jsx
========================================
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import BottomNav from '../components/BottomNav';

export default function History() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
  
  // Refs pro udrĆŸenĂ­ aktuĂĄlnĂ­ho stavu uvnitĆ observeru (bez ohledu na re-rendery)
  const pageRef = useRef(1);
  const loadingRef = useRef(false);
  const hasMoreRef = useRef(true); 
  const observerTarget = useRef(null);

  const loadMore = async () => {
    if (loadingRef.current || !hasMoreRef.current) return;
    
    loadingRef.current = true;
    setLoading(true);
    
    try {
      const res = await fetch(`https://opravyslavkov.shop/api/transactions?page=${pageRef.current}&limit=15`, {
        method: 'GET',
        headers: {
          'Authorization': 'Basic ' + btoa('rbank:TajneHeslo2026'),
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        }
      });

      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${res.status}`);
      }

      const newTx = await res.json();

      if (newTx.length === 0) {
        setHasMore(false);
        hasMoreRef.current = false;
      } else {
        setTransactions(prev => {
          const existingIds = new Set(prev.map(t => t.id));
          const filtered = newTx.filter(t => !existingIds.has(t.id));
          return [...prev, ...filtered];
        });
        pageRef.current += 1;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Chyba pĆipojenĂ­ k DB:", err);
    } finally {
      loadingRef.current = false;
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  // ZavedenĂ­ Intersection Observeru
  useEffect(() => {
    // NaÄte hned pĆi startu prvnĂ­ dĂĄvku
    loadMore();

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver((entries) => {
      // Pokud je nĂĄĆĄ "neviditelnĂœ" prvek na obrazovce (nebo blĂ­zko)
      if (entries[0].isIntersecting) {
        loadMore();
      }
    }, { 
      root: null,
      rootMargin: '200px', // SpustĂ­ naÄĂ­tĂĄnĂ­ uĆŸ 200px pĆedtĂ­m, neĆŸ uĆŸivatel dojede ĂșplnÄ dolĆŻ (plynulejĆĄĂ­ zĂĄĆŸitek)
      threshold: 0 
    });

    if (observerTarget.current) {
      observer.observe(observerTarget.current);
    }

    return () => {
      if (observerTarget.current) observer.unobserve(observerTarget.current);
    };
  }, []);

  const groupedTransactions = transactions.reduce((groups, tx) => {
    const dateObj = tx.created_at ? new Date(tx.created_at) : new Date();
    const dateKey = dateObj.toLocaleDateString('en-CA');
    if (!groups[dateKey]) {
      groups[dateKey] = { dateObj, items: [] };
    }
    groups[dateKey].items.push(tx);
    return groups;
  }, {});

  const formatDateHeader = (dateObj) => {
    const today = new Date();
    if (dateObj.toDateString() === today.toDateString()) return 'DNES';
    const options = { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', weekday: 'long' };
    return dateObj.toLocaleDateString('cs-CZ', options).toUpperCase();
  };

  const enhanceTransaction = (tx) => {
    const amountNum = parseFloat(tx.amount) || 0;
    const isIncome = amountNum > 0;
    const initial = (tx.name && tx.name.length > 0) ? tx.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() : '?';

    return {
      ...tx,
      uiAmount: new Intl.NumberFormat('cs-CZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }).format(Math.abs(amountNum)),
      color: isIncome ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-white',
      sign: isIncome ? '+' : '-',
      iconBg: isIncome ? 'bg-[#3e424c]' : 'bg-gray-700',
      iconText: isIncome ? 'text-[#fcd535]' : 'text-white',
      icon: initial
    };
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white font-sans flex flex-col">
      <header className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 pt-8">
        <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="text-[#3b82f6] p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full transition-colors">
          <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg>
        </button>
        <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold">BÄĆŸnĂœ ĂșÄet</h1>
        <button className="text-[#3b82f6] p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full transition-colors">
          <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21.21 15.89A10 10 0 1 1 8 2.83M22 12A10 10 0 0 0 12 2v10z"/></svg>
        </button>
      </header>

      <div className="px-4 mb-4 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar">
        <button className="bg-[#fcd535] text-black px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-[14px] font-semibold whitespace-nowrap">Historie</button>
        <button className="bg-transparent text-gray-400 px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-[14px] font-medium whitespace-nowrap border border-gray-600">Platby</button>
      </div>

      <div className="flex-1 bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-t-[32px] overflow-y-auto px-5 pt-6 pb-24 shadow-inner">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-5">
          <h2 className="text-[19px] font-bold">PoslednĂ­ pohyby</h2>
        </div>

        {Object.entries(groupedTransactions).map(([dateKey, group]) => (
          <div key={dateKey} className="mb-6">
            <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-gray-400 tracking-wider mb-4 uppercase">
              {formatDateHeader(group.dateObj)}
            </h3>
            <div className="space-y-5">
              {group.items.map((rawTx) => {
                const tx = enhanceTransaction(rawTx);
                return (
                  <div key={tx.id || Math.random()} className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-gray-700 pb-5 last:border-0">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <div className={`w-11 h-11 rounded-full ${tx.iconBg} flex items-center justify-center text-lg font-bold ${tx.iconText}`}>
                        {tx.icon}
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-[15px] font-medium text-gray-100">{tx.name || 'NeznĂĄmĂĄ platba'}</p>
                        <p className="text-[13px] text-gray-400">{tx.type || 'PĆevod'}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-right">
                      <p className={`text-[15px] font-bold ${tx.color}`}>{tx.sign} {tx.uiAmount} CZK</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        {/* InformaÄnĂ­ zprĂĄvy */}
        {loading && <div className="text-center text-gray-400 text-sm py-4">NaÄĂ­tĂĄm transakce...</div>}
        {!hasMore && transactions.length > 0 && <div className="text-center text-gray-500 text-sm py-4">Konec historie</div>}
        
        {/* SledovanĂœ element (Observer Target) */}
        <div ref={observerTarget} className="h-10 w-full"></div>
      </div>
      <BottomNav />
    </div>
  );
}

========================================
 FILE: src/pages/History.jsx.bak
========================================
import React, { useState, useEffect, useRef } from 'react';
import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom';
import BottomNav from '../components/BottomNav';

export default function History() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [transactions, setTransactions] = useState([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
  const [hasMore, setHasMore] = useState(true);
  const scrollRef = useRef(null);
  
  const pageRef = useRef(1);
  const loadingRef = useRef(false);

  const loadMore = async () => {
    if (loadingRef.current || !hasMore) return;
    loadingRef.current = true;
    setLoading(true);
    try {
      // ZmÄna na zabezpeÄenou HTTPS domĂ©nu a pĆidĂĄnĂ­ Basic Auth hlaviÄky
      const res = await fetch(`https://opravyslavkov.shop/api/transactions?page=${pageRef.current}&limit=15`, {
        method: 'GET',
        headers: {
          'Authorization': 'Basic ' + btoa('rbank:TajneHeslo2026'),
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        }
      });
      
      if (!res.ok) {
        throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${res.status}`);
      }
      
      const newTx = await res.json();

      if (newTx.length === 0) {
        setHasMore(false);
      } else {
        setTransactions(prev => {
          const existingIds = new Set(prev.map(t => t.id));
          const filtered = newTx.filter(t => !existingIds.has(t.id));
          return [...prev, ...filtered];
        });
        pageRef.current += 1;
      }
    } catch (err) {
      console.error("Chyba pĆipojenĂ­ k DB:", err);
    }
    loadingRef.current = false;
    setLoading(false);
  };

  useEffect(() => {
    loadMore();
  }, []);

  const handleScroll = (e) => {
    const { scrollTop, clientHeight, scrollHeight } = e.currentTarget;
    if (scrollHeight - scrollTop <= clientHeight + 100) {
      loadMore();
    }
  };

  const groupedTransactions = transactions.reduce((groups, tx) => {
    const dateObj = tx.created_at ? new Date(tx.created_at) : new Date();
    const dateKey = dateObj.toLocaleDateString('en-CA');
    if (!groups[dateKey]) {
      groups[dateKey] = { dateObj, items: [] };
    }
    groups[dateKey].items.push(tx);
    return groups;
  }, {});

  const formatDateHeader = (dateObj) => {
    const today = new Date();
    if (dateObj.toDateString() === today.toDateString()) return 'DNES';
    const options = { day: 'numeric', month: 'long', weekday: 'long' };
    return dateObj.toLocaleDateString('cs-CZ', options).toUpperCase();
  };

  const enhanceTransaction = (tx) => {
    const amountNum = parseFloat(tx.amount) || 0;
    const isIncome = amountNum > 0;
    const initial = (tx.name && tx.name.length > 0) ? tx.name.charAt(0).toUpperCase() : '?';

    return {
      ...tx,
      uiAmount: new Intl.NumberFormat('cs-CZ', { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 }).format(Math.abs(amountNum)),
      color: isIncome ? 'text-green-400' : 'text-white',
      sign: isIncome ? '+' : '-',
      iconBg: isIncome ? 'bg-[#3e424c]' : 'bg-gray-700',
      iconText: isIncome ? 'text-[#fcd535]' : 'text-white',
      icon: initial
    };
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white font-sans flex flex-col">
      <header className="flex items-center justify-between p-4 pt-8">
        <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="text-[#3b82f6] p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full transition-colors">
          <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg>
        </button>
        <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold">BÄĆŸnĂœ ĂșÄet</h1>
        <button className="text-[#3b82f6] p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full transition-colors">
          <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M21.21 15.89A10 10 0 1 1 8 2.83M22 12A10 10 0 0 0 12 2v10z"/></svg>
        </button>
      </header>

      <div className="px-4 mb-4 flex gap-2 overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar">
        <button className="bg-[#fcd535] text-black px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-[14px] font-semibold whitespace-nowrap">Historie</button>
        <button className="bg-transparent text-gray-400 px-5 py-2 rounded-full text-[14px] font-medium whitespace-nowrap border border-gray-600">Platby</button>
      </div>

      <div ref={scrollRef} onScroll={handleScroll} className="flex-1 bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-t-[32px] overflow-y-auto px-5 pt-6 pb-24 shadow-inner">
        <div className="flex justify-between items-center mb-5">
          <h2 className="text-[19px] font-bold">PoslednĂ­ pohyby</h2>
        </div>

        {Object.entries(groupedTransactions).map(([dateKey, group]) => (
          <div key={dateKey} className="mb-6">
            <h3 className="text-[13px] font-semibold text-gray-400 tracking-wider mb-4 uppercase">
              {formatDateHeader(group.dateObj)}
            </h3>
            <div className="space-y-5">
              {group.items.map((rawTx) => {
                const tx = enhanceTransaction(rawTx);
                return (
                  <div key={tx.id || Math.random()} className="flex justify-between items-center border-b border-gray-700 pb-5 last:border-0">
                    <div className="flex items-center gap-4">
                      <div className={`w-11 h-11 rounded-full ${tx.iconBg} flex items-center justify-center text-lg font-bold ${tx.iconText}`}>
                        {tx.icon}
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <p className="text-[15px] font-medium text-gray-100">{tx.name || 'NeznĂĄmĂĄ platba'}</p>
                        <p className="text-[13px] text-gray-400">{tx.type || 'PĆevod'}</p>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                    <div className="text-right">
                      <p className={`text-[15px] font-bold ${tx.color}`}>{tx.sign} {tx.uiAmount} CZK</p>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}

        {loading && <div className="text-center text-gray-400 text-sm py-4">NaÄĂ­tĂĄm transakce...</div>}
        {!hasMore && transactions.length > 0 && <div className="text-center text-gray-500 text-sm py-4">Konec historie</div>}
      </div>
      <BottomNav />
    </div>
  );
}
