export function Settings() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  const [settings, setSettings] = React.useState({
    push: true,
    biometric: true,
    darkMode: true
  });

  const toggle = (key) => setSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: !prev[key] }));

  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white font-sans flex flex-col">
      <header className="flex items-center p-4 pt-8 pb-4 relative border-b border-[#2c2f38]">
        <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="text-[#fcd535] p-2 absolute left-4"><svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M10 19l-7-7m0 0l7-7m-7 7h18"/></svg></button>
        <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold w-full text-center">NastavenĂ­</h1>
      </header>
      <main className="p-4 space-y-4">
        {[
          { id: 'push', label: 'Push notifikace' },
          { id: 'biometric', label: 'PĆihlĂĄĆĄenĂ­ otiskem prstu' },
          { id: 'darkMode', label: 'TmavĂœ reĆŸim (VynucenĂœ)' }
        ].map(s => (
          <div key={s.id} className="bg-[#2c2f38] p-5 rounded-[20px] flex justify-between items-center">
            <span className="font-medium">{s.label}</span>
            <button onClick={() => toggle(s.id)} className={`w-12 h-7 rounded-full transition-colors relative ${settings[s.id] ? 'bg-[#3b82f6]' : 'bg-gray-600'}`}>
              <div className={`w-5 h-5 bg-white rounded-full absolute top-1 transition-all ${settings[s.id] ? 'left-6' : 'left-1'}`}></div>
            </button>
          </div>
        ))}
      </main>
    </div>
  );
}

export function TravelInsurance() {
  const navigate = useNavigate();
  return (
    <div className="min-h-screen bg-[#22252e] text-white pb-24 font-sans flex flex-col">
      <header className="flex items-center p-4 pt-8 border-b border-[#2c2f38] pb-4">
        <button onClick={() => navigate(-1)} className="text-[#3b82f6] mr-4 p-2 active:bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-full">
          <svg className="w-6 h-6" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" strokeWidth="2" viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round" d="M19 12H5M12 19l-7-7 7-7"/></svg>
        </button>
        <h1 className="text-[17px] font-semibold">CestovnĂ­ pojiĆĄtÄnĂ­</h1>
      </header>
      <main className="flex-1 px-4 mt-6">
        <div className="bg-[#2c2f38] rounded-[24px] p-5 shadow-lg border border-[#3e424c] mb-4">

#!/bin/bash

API_URL="https://opravyslavkov.shop/api"
DOCS_URL="https://opravyslavkov.shop/docs/"
POST_OUT="rbank_post_test.json"
GET_OUT="rbank_get_test.json"

echo "=========================================="
echo "  rBank - SekvenÄnĂ­ test API prĆŻchodu"
echo "=========================================="
echo ""

echo "[KROK 1] OvÄĆenĂ­ dostupnosti serveru a HTTPS certifikĂĄtu..."
curl -s -I "$DOCS_URL" | head -n 1
echo ""
read -p "--> Pokud vidĂ­ĆĄ HTTP/2 401, SSL funguje. Stiskni [Enter] pro pokraÄovĂĄnĂ­..."

echo ""
echo "[KROK 2] ManuĂĄlnĂ­ autentizace (Basic Auth)"
read -p "UĆŸivatelskĂ© jmĂ©no: " USERNAME
read -s -p "Heslo: " PASSWORD
echo ""

echo ""
read -p "--> Ădaje vloĆŸeny. Stiskni [Enter] pro odeslĂĄnĂ­ platby (POST /transactions)..."

echo ""
echo "[KROK 3] OdeslĂĄnĂ­ platby..."
PAYLOAD='{
  "name": "Termux TestovacĂ­ UĆŸivatel",
  "type": "OdchozĂ­ Ășhrada",
  "amount": "-150,00",
  "subAmount": "OdeslĂĄno pĆes sekvenÄnĂ­ skript",
  "color": "text-white",
  "iconBg": "bg-[#3e424c]",
  "icon": "đž",
  "badge": "đ€"
}'

HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o "$POST_OUT" -w "%{http_code}" -X POST "${API_URL}/transactions" \
  -u "${USERNAME}:${PASSWORD}" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d "${PAYLOAD}")

echo "HTTP Status kĂłd: $HTTP_STATUS"
echo "OdpovÄÄ backendu:"
cat "$POST_OUT"
echo ""

echo ""
read -p "--> Platba odeslĂĄna. Stiskni [Enter] pro naÄtenĂ­ historie transakcĂ­ (GET /transactions)..."

echo ""
echo "[KROK 4] NaÄtenĂ­ historie transakcĂ­..."
curl -s -X GET "${API_URL}/transactions" \
  -u "${USERNAME}:${PASSWORD}" \
  -H "Accept: application/json" > "$GET_OUT"

cat "$GET_OUT"
echo ""

echo ""
echo "=========================================="
echo "TestovacĂ­ prĆŻchod byl dokonÄen."
echo "=========================================="

========================================
 FILE: update_identity.cjs
========================================
const fs = require('fs');

// --- KONFIGURACE (Tyto hodnoty si mĆŻĆŸeĆĄ upravit) ---
const NEW_APP_NAME = "Raiffeisenbank";
const NEW_APP_ID = "cz.raiffeisenbank.app"; // UnikĂĄtnĂ­ podpis aplikace (bez mezer a diakritiky)
const NEW_VERSION_NAME = "1.1.0";  // Verze viditelnĂĄ pro uĆŸivatele
const NEW_VERSION_CODE = 2;        // InternĂ­ ÄĂ­slo buildu (musĂ­ se zvyĆĄovat s kaĆŸdou aktualizacĂ­)
const NEW_AUTHOR = "raiffeisenbank"; // Autor / TĂœm
// ---------------------------------------------------

console.log('Zahajuji bezpeÄnou Ășpravu identity aplikace...');

function updateJson(filePath, updater) {
    if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
        return console.log(`[!] PĆeskoÄeno: Soubor ${filePath} nenalezen.`);
    }
    fs.copyFileSync(filePath, filePath + '.bak');
    let data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8'));
    updater(data);
    fs.writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(data, null, 2) + '\n');
    console.log(`[v] AktualizovĂĄn: ${filePath}`);
}

function updateText(filePath, replacements) {
    if (!fs.existsSync(filePath)) {
        return console.log(`[!] PĆeskoÄeno: Soubor ${filePath} nenalezen.`);
    }
    fs.copyFileSync(filePath, filePath + '.bak');
    let data = fs.readFileSync(filePath, 'utf8');
    replacements.forEach(r => {
        data = data.replace(r.regex, r.replace);
    });
    fs.writeFileSync(filePath, data);
    console.log(`[v] AktualizovĂĄn: ${filePath}`);
}

// 1. capacitor.config.json
updateJson('capacitor.config.json', (data) => {
    data.appName = NEW_APP_NAME;
    data.appId = NEW_APP_ID;
});

// 2. package.json
updateJson('package.json', (data) => {
    data.name = NEW_APP_NAME.toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-');
    data.version = NEW_VERSION_NAME;
    data.author = NEW_AUTHOR;
});

// 3. Android strings.xml (ViditelnĂ© jmĂ©no v OS Android)
updateText('android/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml', [
    { regex: /<string name="app_name">.*?<\/string>/, replace: `<string name="app_name">${NEW_APP_NAME}</string>` },
    { regex: /<string name="title_activity_main">.*?<\/string>/, replace: `<string name="title_activity_main">${NEW_APP_NAME}</string>` }
]);

// 4. Android build.gradle (Podpis, verze a identifikace)
updateText('android/app/build.gradle', [
    { regex: /applicationId\s+".*?"/, replace: `applicationId "${NEW_APP_ID}"` },
    { regex: /versionCode\s+\d+/, replace: `versionCode ${NEW_VERSION_CODE}` },
    { regex: /versionName\s+".*?"/, replace: `versionName "${NEW_VERSION_NAME}"` }
]);

console.log('\n=== Hotovo ===');
console.log('NynĂ­ mĆŻĆŸeĆĄ zmÄny odeslat na GitHub (git commit & push), coĆŸ automaticky spustĂ­ sestavenĂ­ novĂ© verze.');

import { defineConfig } from 'vite'
import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'

export default defineConfig({
  plugins: [react()],
})
